description_long: This house features a sprawling single-story layout with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the structure includes several protruding sections, giving it a dynamic and asymmetrical footprint. A covered front porch with a peaked roof and supporting columns marks the main entryway, providing a welcoming and sheltered entrance. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed irregularly across the facade, contributing to an informal, homey appearance. The roof includes a prominent central chimney and several intersecting ridges, typical of ranch or craftsman-inspired suburban homes. The overall design suggests a comfortable, spacious residence suitable for a suburban neighborhood.
description: A large, single-story house with a complex, dark-shingled gabled roof, light exterior walls, and an inviting covered front porch. The structure features multiple window arrangements and a central chimney, giving it a suburban, craftsman-inspired look.
description_view_0: This view highlights the covered front porch with its peaked roof and columns, as well as the main entryway and several window placements.
description_view_1: This side view shows a long wall with fewer windows, a large garage opening, and the central chimney rising from the roof.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a long, continuous porch area, multiple windows, and the full expanse of the complex roof structure.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the broad, intersecting roof planes and a single window on the wall beneath the roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with peaked roof, supporting columns, and a recessed main door
